completed_tasks.name: Multi-index c2s transforms + oracle vendor build extension

remaining_tasks.name: Oracle gate closure + v1.0 UAT items

decisions.decision: PTR_ENV_START=20 padding required for libcint env layout
decisions.rationale: Without padding, atom coordinates collide with reserved env slots like PTR_RANGE_OMEGA, activating range-separated Coulomb instead of standard Coulomb

decisions.decision: 3c2e has index swap: third shell maps to l slot, not k slot
decisions.rationale: libcint g3c2e.c sets lk_ceil=0 and ll_ceil=k_l to reuse 2e G-tensor machinery

next_action: Execute Wave 3: Plans 10-04 (3c2e kernel) and 10-05 (2e ERI kernel) in parallel. Both depend on Plan 10-01 shared infra which is complete.
context_notes: Phase 10 execution in progress via auto-advance chain (discuss -> plan -> execute). Waves 1-2 complete (plans 10-01, 10-02, 10-03). Wave 3 agents (10-04, 10-05) were rejected by user before spawning. Wave 4 (10-06: oracle gate closure) depends on all kernel plans. The --no-transition flag is active. After all waves complete, verify_phase_goal runs, then returns PHASE COMPLETE to the parent plan-phase auto-advance chain.
